failure_modes.mode: Thermal runaway from nitrile oxide dimerization
failure_modes.cause: Temperature excursion >130°C triggers exothermic side reaction in viscous DES with poor heat dissipation
failure_modes.mitigation: Install redundant temperature monitoring every 10m of coil with emergency cooling protocol

failure_modes.mode: Viscous DES crystallization causing flow blockage
failure_modes.cause: Local cooling below eutectic point (~80°C) in coil sections or fittings
failure_modes.mitigation: Heat trace entire flow path including fittings; maintain minimum 90°C throughout

failure_modes.mode: BPR valve fouling from DES decomposition products
failure_modes.cause: High temperature DES degradation creates particulates that accumulate in BPR mechanism
failure_modes.mitigation: Install inline filter upstream of BPR; implement scheduled BPR cleaning protocol

single_points_of_failure: BPR valve — blockage stops all flow and eliminates pressure control
Primary heating zone — failure causes temperature drop and DES solidification
validation_experiments: Run DES blank at 120°C for 4 hours; monitor for particulate formation and pressure drift
Test controlled cooling to 70°C and reheating cycle to verify DES resolubilization
Operate at 125°C for 30 min to assess thermal stability margin before runaway conditions
